incident_summary: Remediation service experienced complete failure of automated remediation actions for approximately 2.5 hours due to Microsoft Graph API outage, with SEV-2 severity

root_cause.summary: Microsoft Graph API outage caused complete failure of remediation actions that depend on this external service
root_cause.trigger: Microsoft Graph API service degradation returning HTTP 503 errors
root_cause.mechanism: Remediation service requires Microsoft Graph API to execute automated remediation actions; when Graph API became unavailable with 503 errors, all remediation actions failed and queued, causing action latency to spike from 1.5s baseline to 48-62s as actions timed out and retried

customer_impact.description: Customers experienced complete failure of automated remediation actions for detected threats. While threat detection continued operating normally, any automated responses (such as quarantining emails, blocking users, or remediating compromised accounts) were delayed until the Microsoft service recovered. Actions that should have executed immediately were queued and processed after the 2.5-hour outage window.

resolution.action_taken: No internal action required — incident resolved when Microsoft restored Graph API service availability
resolution.confirmed_by: CloudWatch logs showing HTTP 200 responses from graph.microsoft.com at 18:55 UTC, remediation actions resuming successfully, and metrics showing action latency returning to 1.5-1.7s baseline by 19:00 UTC

root_cause: CloudWatch logs showing consistent HTTP 503 errors from graph.microsoft.com starting 16:25 UTC
Slack thread confirming Microsoft Graph API outage and Microsoft status page verification
PagerDuty resolution message attributing recovery to Microsoft Graph API restoration
timeline: CloudWatch logs first 503 error at 16:25 UTC (onset)
Prometheus metrics showing latency spike from 1.6s to 48s at 16:30 UTC
CloudWatch logs showing Graph API recovery at 18:55 UTC
Prometheus metrics showing latency return to 1.7s at 19:00 UTC
customer_impact: Slack thread confirming detection pipeline unaffected
Prometheus metrics showing stable IES detection throughput throughout incident
CloudWatch logs showing remediation action failures and subsequent backlog processing
Prometheus metrics showing 30-40x increase in action latency indicating complete functional failure of remediation

data_gaps: Number of customers affected or total count of delayed remediation actions
Geographic scope of Microsoft Graph API outage (whether global or regional)
Specific types of remediation actions that were queued (email quarantine, user blocking, etc.)
Whether any critical/high-severity threats were detected during the outage window that required manual intervention
Customer notifications sent during the incident
internal_details_to_exclude: Slack thread usernames and channel references
